reviews.title: Very overpriced and overrated
reviews.text: The hotel itself was fine, it was just the little things. 14$ for a glass of wine, 1.50 for a phone call, 38$ for valet parking. My 3 o'clock room wasn't ready till 5, and everything had a price tag on it. I will stay at Hiltons from now on.

reviews.title: Reception staff are rude and ignorant.
reviews.positives: Breakfast
reviews.negatives: Reception staff

reviews.title: It was an inconvenience to learn my hotel room had been cancelled because I arrived after midnight and was asked to pay
reviews.positives: Nothing.
reviews.negatives: The bed and bedding was uncomfortable, the heater ac unit wasn’t working and because the toilet was broken it kept running nonstop disturbing my sleep.

reviews.title: Girls Trip
reviews.text: Overall, the hotel stay was pleasant. However we all felt like the AC's, in the room, could have been much cooler, especially in the summer heat.

reviews.title: Absolutely trouble experience - I’ll never return to this place (it’s a Marriott property)
reviews.negatives:
Property overcharged me $700 without authorization or explanation in addition to the $75 per night for incidentals. When staff helped they were unclear and wouldn’t really answer questions. The manager Jennifer I spoke to tried to be professional but responded to me with disrespect when I tried to get her to refund my money they had no right to take. I’m still waiting for the funds. 

Also, the bed linens are trashy textiles. The windows are dirty. They’ve dressed up a Drury Inn apparently in order to fleece people. Don’t go to this hotel. Austin has other comparable hotels of higher quality.

reviews.title: Concierto
reviews.text: Su nivel de calidad es de los mejores o el mejor hotal austin tx

reviews.title: Would not recommend.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: No services.  Restaurant that was on site was marginal very few choices.  No room service no vending machines. Would not recommend. No value for the price.

reviews.title: Negocios
reviews.text: Es uno de los mejor hoteles en Austin tx

reviews.title: Will not stay there again.
reviews.positives: Location.
reviews.negatives: Color scheme. Noise in room from outside, even on the 15th floor. Old.  Outdated.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The property was nice, my problem was a lack of hospitality. The bell hop/ valet was unhelpful, he asked if he could take our bags but then questioned why we needed help if we had so few bags. I just told him never mind and went about carrying all of my own things. The woman that checked me in was the only person that was kind and acknowledged me. Otherwise it was a cold and odd experience and not worth the money.

reviews.title: not recommended looking at the price given
Disappointing hotel somewhat isolated …..poor dining options
reviews.positives: Housekeeping was responsive and helpful
reviews.negatives: Problems with heating the first night and while the new room assigned was better the problem with water ( shut off) was a hassle.

reviews.title: 2 amazing staff made a difference- Chasity and Kenny. Smelly -like Motel 6 but costs like Hilton-not close to anything.
reviews.positives: Staff-specifically Chasity and Kenny at the front desk were exceptional- this is why the rating is higher. They went above and beyond to make us happy. They know what is customer service and I hope they teach the rest. Breakfast was amazing.
reviews.negatives:
Carpets were smelly (tobacco or vape)and we asked a room change  which the staff obliged but the smell was the same. I left my electric toothbrush and asked if housekeeping found it and was asked to go on a website to look for lost and found when I was in the lobby.
Not really close to anything. Felt like Motel 6 but Hilton costs.

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.positives: Staff is very friendly!!! Clean hotel great location
reviews.negatives: I booked a two queen room like 2 months ago because I have two teenagers!! While when we arrived they said they only had a king bed and we could get a roll away bed well it was a twin and they could not fit so she had to sleep with us. We paid for the view of the capital which we did not get at all

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Our room didn’t have a TV remote. When I went down to the front office I was informed that it was electrical and the only option at that point was being told to move to another room. At that point my wife was already in bed and it would have been a hassle to move. We also found stains that were on our towels (looked like fecal wipes) and asked for new towels but never got them.

reviews.title: Stayed only one night parking garage seemed dirty and dark hall way was humid windows were humind
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Ice machine not on every floor, using key on elevator was annoying

reviews.title: Not a good value for the money
reviews.positives: Facilities
reviews.negatives:
Very poor breakfast, despite the fact the hotel didn’t recognized it was already included in my rate,
Environment not adequate for regular families

reviews.title: Was ok, wouldn’t stay at this property again
reviews.positives: Location, common areas
reviews.negatives: Rooms were really poorly lit, smelled very mildewy, not enough towels, no safe for valuables.

reviews.title: Nice but not as nice as it has been my last visits
reviews.positives: Location is near to my sons apartment.
reviews.negatives: Facilities seem to be in need of some minor repairs. I was asked to change rooms mid stay without an specific reason.

reviews.title: I never received my $70 refundable hold after checking out.
reviews.positives: I never received my $70 refundable hold after checking out.
reviews.negatives: I never received my $70 refundable hold after checking out.

reviews.title: No a great value for money.  Room was mediocre
reviews.negatives: Parking was very expensive - and no alternatives  No deals for parking by Hotel.  Only way to pay for parking was by phone.

reviews.title: Decent stay but would try somewhere else next time.
reviews.positives: Close location to downtown, walking distance to entertainment.
reviews.negatives: Retro design looked more like a remodel of older facilities than an intentional design. Hotel felt older and dated on some aspect.

reviews.title: Lovely swim club and breakfast bar - but they need to fix the ACs in the rooms Texas is too hot for that
reviews.positives: The staff was amazing and friendly the location for a concert at moody amphitheater is perfect !! Just a short walk
reviews.negatives: The first rooms AC did not work (rm 1630)- we were moved to a second room (1026)- which barely worked at 75 degrees. It was a rough hot night

reviews.title: Good and Bad stay
reviews.positives: Been here before
reviews.negatives: Same problem we had last time we were here with the toilet stopping up. We had to relocate to another room. Probably not coming back sorry

reviews.title: Unfortunate circumstance on our last day because everything else on other days were comfortable.
reviews.positives: The facilities offered at the hotel were lovely, especially the heated pool and gym! It was the perfect stay for a girl's trip, within range of most things we wanted to do in Austin. The staff were very helpful and friendly; I also enjoyed the convenience of MorningBird (coffee/ snacks) in the lobby.
reviews.negatives: Everything felt perfect until the last day when the temperatures dropped. I was wondering why I was coughing and sneezing more when I realized that the windows were leaking water all around the edges. Two windows were covering two walls of the room, one of them facing the TV & other electronic appliances. Seems like a health/safety hazard as this wet the walls, carpet and anything basically below or around the area.

reviews.title: Expensive nice but rough stay in Downtown Austin
reviews.positives: Nice beds, coffee machine was nice, great tv and stations, nice shower
reviews.negatives: Low water pressure in sink, ac wasn’t working well (it’s 98 degrees outside yet it couldn’t bring down the temp) staff at front desk was overwhelmed- too few of them, very hectic parking situation, price was very high (but probably normal for Austin)

reviews.title: I disliked we booked for capital view for my daughter birthday and did NOT get a capital view. I wouldn’t have paid extr
reviews.positives: Very nice interior of building .
reviews.negatives: I don’t have anything to dislike other than the parking situation. I feel like if you pay to stay the night here you should be accommodated parking

reviews.title: It’s was ok.
reviews.positives: I liked the location. Also the rooms were cold and the bed was comfortable. Very clean
reviews.negatives: Pink. Everything is pink, made me want to vomit. Also they charged more than the final price listed

reviews.title: My stay was pleasant considering I wasn’t there all the time.
reviews.positives: I loved the pool area, the rooms were very cute and so was the boot wall in the lobby.
reviews.negatives: There were a few things that I wasn’t amazingly happy about. I received 10+ noise complaint messages when no one was in the room, the outlet and lamp on one side of the bed didn’t work, the phone wouldn’t allow me to call the lobby, the water pressure was very low, the lights around the mirror would go in and out, there was also no safe to keep personal belongings in the room as well, and there wasn’t a whole lot of storage in the room.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The stuff is really nice! The design of the hotel really cool and interesting!!
Location is good next to main road 35 but far from 6 street
reviews.negatives:
The pool was small and full of people.
The bed is too soft and not comfortable.

reviews.title: Decent but parking is $$
reviews.positives: Nice clean rooms.  Good location
reviews.negatives: Fridge was not cold.  Room was not ready at the 3pm checkin time (had to wait till 4pm).  Power went out at night (from 3am-4am).  Using the parking garage is $50/night so you have to find street parking nearby to get something cheap, but it’s limited.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Already reviewed on previous nights reservation

reviews.title: Fun trip to Austin,disappointed that our first night couldn’t be refunded due to hurricane Milton, our airport was close
reviews.positives:
Location was convenient 
Rooms were comfortable
reviews.negatives: Pool area and bar were not very pleasing

reviews.title: Great staff, good location, so-so accommodations.
reviews.positives: The staff was great. They were very personable and helpful. Our meal at the restaurant was really good and the breakfast/ coffee shop off the lobby were very good.
reviews.negatives: The room had to have been designed by a man because there were just two mirrors, one of which was over the sink which was separate from the bathroom and then a full length mirror, but the lighting was terrible. It made it really difficult to put on makeup. Also, there was no closet, just a rack to hang clothes with a couple of shelves. Our view overlooked a roof and HVAC vents, a crane, and the highway. That was okay given the price, but the window was filthy. It looked like it hadn't been cleaned for years.

reviews.title: Good but not Great
reviews.positives: The place is perfectly located to what I wanted. The furnishings were fine.
reviews.negatives: I waited an hour and a half to check in. Turned down AC and got changed for my event. Left about 4:30 pm. When I returned somewhere around 11pm the room was still not cool enough. I took a cold shower and laid down. Around 3 am it finally became comfortable. Also the deadbolt didn't work. I  personally didn't like the layout of the room. I ran into table during night when i got up to go to bathroom. I left by 8 am .

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel, overall, is cute with all the pink. The food was also very good and the pool was nice.
reviews.negatives: The room was very small, compared to what the photos looked like online, and had very poor lighting.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The pool
reviews.negatives: The price was ridiculous. No one not everyone cares about UT or football, but the good thing is it's close to the medical area and the pool service was nice. The hotel is much too large and the room just really did not meet expectations. It wasn't comfortable although I find it. It was well equipped, I think the food selection and overall was just poor the neighborhood's great, everything was in walking distance. The parking garage is kind of scary and I think the place just needs an overall general cleaning. Replace carpets, better dusting sanitation end of common areas. I thought it was pretty clean. The staff was very friendly. If not, they weren't quite as professional as you would hope for that price per night. You know, they were there, but they were, you know, it's like kids playing around and not really that price. I think you should have a bit more of a professional staff for that price. Just having people present but not being professional. It doesn't match what you're offering. The pool area was fantastic service was fantastic. Food was fantastic. The server was fantastic. Great value for the money.The hostess, everybody that worked in that pool area deserves a raise and praise

reviews.title: Very cute retro style but could be better
reviews.positives: Retro look and location
reviews.negatives: AC in the room seemed low or broken.

reviews.title: Good stay. The food at the restaurant was good too and it was open late enough.
reviews.positives: Fun place yet comfortable
reviews.negatives: No soap to wash hands at the sink in the bathroom

reviews.title: Fabulouos Hotel, Fabulous Staff
reviews.positives: Perfect location
reviews.negatives: Honestly the whole hotel is amazing! The beds and bedding are always so uncomfortable. I will stay there again and just bring my own blanket and pillow. I love the hotel too much not to stay

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice place!
reviews.negatives: Old decor.

reviews.title: Very courteous and helpful staff.
reviews.positives: Downtown Austin,  very easy to find.

Cashless
Entrance was a little difficult during traffic.

reviews.title: Had a good time

reviews.negatives: Paid for a corner room but didn’t get one

reviews.title: Amazing stay, other than parking crew, it was wonderful.
reviews.positives: Great aesthetic, front desk staff are very helpful.
reviews.negatives: The parking was very confusing, and the app makes many mistakes

reviews.title: We had a pleasant and enjoyable experience

reviews.title: Downright Awesome
reviews.positives: Clean and really pretty hotel
reviews.negatives: Parking

reviews.title: Downright lovely stay (minus the swimming pool)
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel was easily walkable from downtown and to most of the places we needed to get to. The staff were so helpful and lovely. The room was spacious and had such a fun retro vibe. We loved staying here.
reviews.negatives: The swimming pool was a bit murky and infested with big ants (live and dead and some struggling/drowning in the water). This might just be a Texas weather thing, but my daughter did not like the swimming pool and refused to go back. Normally, she loves swimming. It was disappointing, especially because the weather was hot.

reviews.title: perfect for the f1 race. didn''t spend a ton of time there. some of the williams team in lobby ! fun
reviews.positives:
bed and pillows were comfy. tv huge.
loved the mini f1 celebratory chocolates and treats.
very close to the shuttle pickup and dropoff for the races
liked being able to control the temperature.
thanks for the fridge already in place.
reviews.negatives: would love drawers in the room without having to ask for them.  sound of traffic, though it put me in the mood for the race.

reviews.title: An stylish and pinky hotel for a pittoresque stay.
reviews.positives: Very stylish and unique hotel. Friendly staff. Confortable sheets and bed. Silence is king.
reviews.negatives: Although the breakfast was included in the reservation, every day I have to pick up a “cortesy” card.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Overall, pretty good. Clean room, nice lobby and stuff. Only complains is the interrupted internet speed. The Wifi internet is not very stable at room, which causes inconvenience for important online activities.

reviews.title: Overall good experience
reviews.positives: The beds were comfortable and the room was clean.
reviews.negatives: Parking was over priced at $60 a day. This made the overall cost of the stay to high.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Parking was a little expensive per night specially since you are already paying for the stay but nothing to call home about. The place was very cute, the vibes and aesthetics great.
reviews.negatives: the room was dark, this could be solved by opening up a window or smt but at night the room was very dim.

reviews.title: My Time as the Downright Austin
reviews.positives:
I enjoyed the overall vibe that the hotel had. The hotel's housekeeping did an excellent job every time. 
The hotel was as described. The location was the perfect spot in downtown which was accessible to any area in a short amount of time. The bed was large & firm. They had alot of amenities.
reviews.negatives:
I wasn't a fan of the front desk clerks. It seemed as though they did not care about assisting us. They lacked the enthusiasm to help. However, they still answered questions asked and were still helpful. They weren't as welcoming as one would assume to put it short. 
There was a smell throughout the floor of old smoke that I wasn't too pleased with. 
I felt as if the mirror area/sink could use more lighting. It felt too dark in that area at times.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location  and prices
reviews.negatives: The bath towels  hard and the refrigerator too small

reviews.title: Perfect stay for the rainy weekend
reviews.positives: I love the pink color theme all through the hotel making it pretty. I liked that the gym is open 24 hours. I wish the pool was open till midnight but it closes at 10 pm. The staff is very welcoming and helpful. The coffee shop by the lobby is good but a little expensive. The swim club restaurant needs more vegetarian options.
reviews.negatives: I wish the pool was open till midnight

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice hotel and the staff was very nice
reviews.negatives: Bathroom needs better lighting and hot water took some time to heat up

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location. Very friendly and helpful staff
reviews.negatives: Old building; for the price the amenities should have been better. Very dark rooms and carpets old

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: The hotel next to the living of Homeless and those on drugs.
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Queues of homeless people and on drugs just next to the hotel.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay at Downright.
reviews.positives: That staff were incredibly accommodating and so kind. Every single interaction was pleasant and left me feeling grateful.
reviews.negatives: The music in the lobby was very loud. Also, if you stay in a room above the pool the music is very loud as well. We actually moved rooms because of this. Hence the staff being super kind and accommodating statement above.

reviews.title: Nice stay.
reviews.positives: Hotel and staff were great and helpful except the server for dinner in the swim club.
reviews.negatives: Being charged $1 for tonic and a $1 for lime was a bit ridiculous, and the server in swim club for dinner was very annoyed and acted like she didn't want to be there. Not very welcoming.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Interesting and different hotel (think pink)
reviews.positives: The property is modern and decoration is different than a regular hotel. The location is good (couple of blocks from the capitol). The staff is friendly. It has an interesting concept of restaurant called “swim club”. The breakfast place called morning bird has good food.
reviews.negatives:
The area is surrounded by homeless, so even as it could be walking distance from the capitol and places to eat, you will think it twice once you see the homeless.

The hotel is located near the freeway, so you can hear the noise of the cars at night (it may depend on the room location? And maybe I wake up easily)

The “swim club” which is located on the first floor is a restaurant opened to the public (with a very cool decor) but also that means the hotel pool was open to the public. They did not need the hotel key to use the pool or even grab a towel. It was mostly packed with women drinking there (drinks looked cool) and everyone was in good behavior, but it did not feel like family environment (I was with my 7yo). Also there was no sitting space, or chairs or even a place to put your stuff as a guest of the hotel (unless you go at 11 am when they open). So depending on what you are looking for this will be a plus for you or a con (in my case, married with kids it was a con since we couldn’t really use the pool).

Parking is $49 nightly, as most of the hotels in the area, just keep it in mind when comparing prices.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hotel staff were super friendly and helpful!
reviews.negatives: Pool was gross by the end of the weekend, a different color. And didnt love the charged snacks in the room, would rather they just werent there.

reviews.title: Good but I expected great.
reviews.positives: Great decor, ambience. Good location, great price. Pool was great.
reviews.negatives: The hallways were dirty. The concert hall next to the hotel kept me up one night. The lobby music is too loud for 6AM, the coffee was too expensive. Rooms should be quieter.

reviews.title: Very pleasant.
reviews.positives: Quiet. Clean. Convenient in-house cafe and restaurant. Good fitness facility.
reviews.negatives: Mini-fridge in room lacked a freezer compartment.

reviews.title: Great stay and recommend it

reviews.negatives: Ordering room service didn’t work and every time we called the front desk it would be transferred and disconnected

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Pool was insanely crowded because they allow locals to buy passes to swim there, not a huge pool

reviews.title: Didn’t want to leave!
reviews.positives: Downright is too cute, love the design and style. The staff were professional, helpful and very pleasant. The hotel was clean, gym is well equipped, beds were comfy, AC got nice and cold, but our favorite amenity was def the pool! Poolside drinks were delish. Had a great stay and will stay again!
reviews.negatives: Parking is pricey!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Loved the hotel, lovely design and fun spaces
reviews.negatives: The parking is expensive

reviews.title: Great

reviews.title: Glam Motel vibe, perfect for SXSW⚡️

reviews.title: Really fun place for couples and it’s a short 5 minute walk from Franklin’s BBQ.

reviews.negatives: The listing said a tub was in the room but there was only a shower.

reviews.title: Great value, great location and a cool place with a great vibe!!
reviews.positives: Hotel had a coffee shop and a bar with good food and great ambience.
reviews.negatives: Lighting in room was dark. Hard to see putting makeup on in the morning.

reviews.title: Can’t wait to come back!

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Unfortunately this location seems to be a busy spot for police action. Also we thought the pricing for the hotel parking garage was a little high for guests staying at the hotel and due to the difficulty of finding other means of parking and not knowing the area much we paid anyways.

reviews.title: great comfortable affordable stay in the center of town
reviews.positives: comfortable and spacious room, on site restaurant, outdoor pool with cool off fans and relaxing lawn.
reviews.negatives: minor, no curtains in the room felt weird, I know there is reflective films on the windows but I felt exposed.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Even though I wasn’t there much it was a fantastic facility
reviews.positives: It was great
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Except parking was a bit expensive

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It is great for taking pictures. No other hotel like it. I am a male, however, I like taking pictures of my wife in beautiful settings and this place has it all. Highly recommended it. Read all the reviews,  good and bad. Bad ones were from people expecting a hotel experience, this is for people who enjoy beauty and disregard minor accommodations. By the way, those accommodations are available upon request at the reception. Loved the hotel and its vintage vibe.
reviews.negatives: Only downside of Downright is paying for parking space....$50+ as a matter of fact. Besides that, wonderful hotel and great staff.

reviews.title: Feel Home Comfort
reviews.positives: The worker was super nice and helpful with any questions or help needed. They make you feel like you are taken care of. The place was clean, easy to access, and served a delicious breakfast.
reviews.negatives: The swimming club has the opportunity to improve. The connection doors between the rooms need voice isolation materials. These are not complaints or i don't like however i want to bring it up.

reviews.title: Fun, relaxed vibe and friendly people in a great location. Family and grown-up friendly.
reviews.positives:
Pool - it is super fun and cute, cozy patio setting. Good DJs on DJ nights and still a family-friendly vibe even when there are loads of uni students and couples and later in the evening. Fun cocktails for me, yummy pizza and snacks for my kids. 
Rooms - they are cute and cozy and the colors are happy and retro. Very simple and functional but still warm and pretty spacious. Two Queen room was perfect for three. 
Location - if you like live music, bars, etc this is perfect since all of that is in walking distance. Close to the medical centers, in case that is why you are staying in Austin. Cheap uber ride to most places in the Austin area. 
Staff - by far the reason we kept coming back. Jordana and Cesar are stand-outs and the restaurant and cafe staff are all outstanding. Friendly, accommodating, and professional. You can tell the people working here generally like what they do (or they are great at pretending) and it translates into everyone being super friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to complain about.

reviews.title: I loved the accommodations and I can't wait to go back!
reviews.positives: I loved the aesthetic!  It was cute and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: The walls were thin.

reviews.title: Indoor pool area converted to a restaurant area was so was so cool.
reviews.positives: Calm and laidback vibe. Very colorful and staff extremely nice and attentive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The bed was so comfortable and restaurant inside was great.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately because being near IH-35, it was noisy. The views were great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved the decor, & branding. Perfect for a girls trip!
reviews.negatives: The lighting could’ve been better. Was difficult to do my makeup. Food at the morning bird could’ve been better. Smoothie options would’ve been great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: My son and I were in town to attend Texas relays for my other son and stayed here. The stay was amazing. Any time I visit Austin going forward I will stay here.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great customer service at all times. Friendly staff. Clean and comfortable with good location.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff, are welcoming and wonderful.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Comfortable, Cozy, Chic !
reviews.positives: Unique atmosphere and great location.
reviews.negatives: No complaints , my visit was short but it’s just what I needed for a comfortable classy stay.

reviews.title: Delighted and interested in returning.
reviews.positives: Such a cool venue! We loved the music in the lobby, the decorations, the ‘Swim Bar’ and breakfast area. Great personnel as well!

reviews.title: Overall, it was a great stay and we will definitely be back if we are ever in Austin again.
reviews.positives: The location was great, was very central to town and a good experience. The guest service was good as well, we felt very comfortable in our stay.
reviews.negatives: Overall everything was great! Our hairdryer wasn’t working well, but we called guest services and they were able to give us another one!

reviews.title: PINK PINK PINK
reviews.positives: Better than what we expected! We stayed here to celebrate our friends bachelorette party and the place was perfect! Everything in this place is pink!!! The bar was super nice, bartenders are friendly and drinks were amazing. The rooms were super clean and comfortable. We requested a high floor with a view and we got it. Coffee shop is great too! Definitely recommend this place to anyone.

reviews.title: In town for a concert with friends- very awesome, fun hotel to hang out and relax!
reviews.positives:
Valet- SUPER helpful
Bartender- Went above and beyond when an "unusual" cocktail was requested
Pool  and Pool Staff- Super friendly, very helpful, love all the pool floats! LOVE the pool/lounge area
Housekeeping- VERY clean rooms
Overall- love the robes and the general VIBE of the hotel!
Front Desk- very helpful at check-in/check-out
reviews.negatives:
Front Desk- Waited quite awhile at desk at 0200 to resolve an issue- never was able to talk to anyone that night
Housekeeping- Did not replenish water, coffee, cups. Threw my bamboo toothbrush away! I think she thought it was disposable ;-)
Front desk- needs to be a little more knowledgeable about restaurants/activities within walking distance
Rooms- Need more hooks in bathroom for towels; Need more furniture or luggage racks. No place to unpack clothes or even set an open suitcase! (There is one small cupboard with shelves and the metal rack.

reviews.title: It was our first time in Austin and we had a wonderful stay.
reviews.positives: The aesthetic of the hotel was awesome. My friend and I really enjoyed the café downstairs.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing glaringly wrong with the property.

reviews.title: REALLY COOL, RETRO RENOVATED HOTEL
reviews.positives: Decor, staff, location, amenities were great!
reviews.negatives: The ice machines were not working on my floor.  The hand soap smelled horrible.  The toilet paper holder was not properly installed with anchors, so was loose.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Decor, food, location, staff..all.good!

reviews.title: Such a girlie 80s feel girls weekend

reviews.negatives: I couldnt stream everything. Like peacock

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Absolutely phenomenal location looks and vibes

reviews.negatives: Wish It had a bigger fridge , we had a daughter with allergies so it helps to have a better fridge to store food if she needs it .

The location is great to move around downtown, the staff was very friendly and professional, the whole hotel has very aesthetic vibes that make you feel cheerful if you’re staying for a vacation. 
Everything was clean and neat.
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Will be staying here again

reviews.title: Vus sur magnifique Austin
reviews.positives: J’ai adoré cet établissement, la chambre était magnifique, branché et impeccable. La déco de l’hôtel était superbe. La conception du resto dans l’ancienne piscine intérieure était vraiment originale et la nourriture délicieuse et décontractée.
reviews.negatives: Un des seuls inconvénients était l’achalandage de la piscine car l’hôtel offre des forfaits pour les non-résidents de l’hôtel et il nous était impossible d’avoir une chaise ou transat de libre. Les cocktails ainsi que le café resto, même si délicieux, étaient très dispendieux 15-20$ USD est complètement ridicule.

reviews.title: Je recommande, emplacement et décoration au top.
reviews.positives: La décoration très sympa, bon emplacement, propre, piscine et salle de sport très bien.
reviews.negatives:
Isolation sonore avec les bruits extérieurs (voiture, klaxon…)  
Prix du parking… 42$ la nuit pour le parking de l’hôtel (49$ avec un valet)

reviews.title: Hôtel branché et bien décoré
reviews.positives: Jolie hôtel avec piscine et musique pour finir la journée dans la bonne ambiance

reviews.title: À part la propreté DES EXTÉRIEURS tout était parfait!!!
reviews.positives: Le design, l’emplacement, les services !
reviews.negatives:
La propreté des extérieurs.
L’endroit est super sympa mais par exemple au bar extérieur , les tables étaient TOUTES salles et collantes,  au bord de la piscine, les des canettes, des vieux bonbons, des tables non débarrassées…
Sans parler des déchets naturels comme les feuilles et autres.

reviews.title: Superbe expérience

reviews.title: Eine stylische und freundliche Unterkunft, um fußläufig Austin zu erkunden.
reviews.positives: Die Mitarbeiter waren sehr freundlich, zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit. Die Lage perfekt, um Austin zu Fuß zu erkunden. Die Deko im pinken Poolhausstil war außergewöhnlich, die Bar sehr cool.

reviews.positives: Ruime kamer!

reviews.negatives: 部屋が寒くエアコンの温度調整がうまくできなかった。部屋にセイフティボックスがなかった。ハイウェイのすぐそばだったのでうるさかった。

reviews.title: 喜歡這家旅館的位置 若有自駕需求的旅客可以選這家 附近也有很多酒館 晚上需要外出放鬆一下感受美式休閒的住客可
reviews.positives:
旅館地點非常棒. 附近有公車站, 餐廳, 租車公司Hertz, Avis就在旅館附近, 出行非常方便. 
一樓大廳有很棒的咖啡及點心可以安靜地休息享用. 價格很親民. 第一次遇到旅館裡的食物定價這麼便宜的.
泳池及健身房也很推薦. 
酒店的泊車小弟非常熱情, 親切.
reviews.negatives:
沒有每天清掃客房 這是這次唯一遺憾的地方
住宿未含早餐但可以在一樓大廳購買 價格很親民
旅館停車需收費 費用不便宜

reviews.title: Good for a short staycation

reviews.negatives: Ну очень странно, что раковина в коридоре, а не в туалете, и никаких dental kit в номере…

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Район river street, много бездомных и не совсем адекватных людей. Так же не совсем понял схему уборки в номере

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Wasn’t able to get a room
reviews.negatives: Wasn’t able to get a room

reviews.title: One poor service interaction can run the whole experience
reviews.positives: The location. The spaciousness of the room. The decor. The quality of bed.
reviews.negatives:
My experience left me quite bewildered—mostly due to one front desk staff member's attitude, which was quite rude. I was honestly stunned.

The day before our departure, I approached the front desk to settle the bill early, hoping to avoid any last-minute rush before our morning flight. Imagine my surprise when the agent curtly informed me, "No, you cannot Sir. Come back tomorrow morning to settle the bill upon checkout. That is the way it is." As someone who works in the hospitality industry, I was taken aback. I can't say I've ever encountered a hotel that refuses early payment.

What really stung was the complete lack of politeness—no smile, no empathy, just a rather cold command. It felt more like a reprimand than a service interaction.

The next morning, I went back to check out, only to be greeted by a different agent who casually mentioned that, because I booked through a third-party service, my bill had already been settled using the card I used to make a booking. Confused, I realized I had no recollection of any pre-payment. Later in the day, I found out the charge had been processed on the incidental card I provided at check-in, which was not the card I intended to use for payment.

reviews.title: Situated in a good area and great decor but let down by staff and amenities
reviews.positives: Good spot
reviews.negatives: Air con didn’t get room below 85f

reviews.title: Ourtrageous parking charge
reviews.negatives: The $50 dollar charge for parking overshadowed everything that was good about my star

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The view of the city
reviews.negatives: It’s not what I expected plus they charge $50 for parking your car over night as the hotel doesn’t own the parking in there building

reviews.title: Not bad at all, just frustrating as it could easily have been ideal.
reviews.positives: Excellent, friendly cleaning staff. Always smiling, always helpful, always flexible & responsive.
reviews.negatives: I wouldn't have paid extra for a Capitol view room if I'd known that we would not be provided one "as they're all booked" when we arrived. No adjustment was made.

reviews.title: Ok for one night
reviews.positives: Nice pool bar, interesting design
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Good location, lovely staff and comfy beds.
reviews.negatives: A lot of hairs on the floor all over the bedroom and bathroom.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Fun, spacious
reviews.negatives: It wasn’t quite luxury but it was fun

reviews.title: Expensive and a bit weird
reviews.positives:
Checked in had to wait for a room after not being able to find our booking…. Eventually made it to the room which was spacious ( corner king) the cafe was really expensive and the coffee was awful… croissants were ok but overpriced…. The downstairs bar was pre mixed cocktails and limited food options , the salad and chips and fries were ok as snacks …It was a very bizarre atmosphere in the bar area…. Reception staff and valets were really friendly … cleaner did our room everyday but did throw away my half drank bottles of coke and sprite these were not near the bin but at my bedside table ( seemed very odd) overall a good stay but wouldn’t go back … ok location… bathroom set up was toilet and shower and sink was separate in the bedroom … also lighting was really dim so couldn’t put make up on as no light or table only sink area …. Hairdryer was poor and got red hot but didn’t dry very well… steamer for clothes provided and was good … coffee was better in the room but had to move machine as no plug nearby !!!!! 
This hotel was nice but could do so much better….

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice rétro décoration. Good location.
reviews.negatives: We can hear the noise from the room next to ours.

reviews.title: Nice hotel but be careful & check your bill
reviews.positives: A lovely hotel, the lobby and rooms are nicely decorated. Nice cafe in the lobby & the bartender at the restaurant was lovely & I had great service there.
reviews.negatives:
The pool area could use some TLC & I was given an adjoining room where you can hear everything in the neighbouring room which wasn’t ideal.

When I checked in I was told $75 would be taken from my card for incidentals. I noticed the following day that $1100 had been taken instead. I went to reception to report this, they advised this was an error but there was no apology or anything, the money was refunded after 3 days of raising the complaint, however today (day after check out) an additional $400 has been taken - I will be raising this with the hotel again now. I understand mistakes are made but I would have expected a verbal apology as an absolute minimum

reviews.title: Can improve on cleanliness overall good stay
reviews.positives: Cute design, for the money it is good value
reviews.negatives: Unique style, location might be slightly too far from things but you can definitely still walk which we did. A bit disappointed that the quilt and pillow case had a few stains on it which didn’t make it a comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hotel is well situated and the rooms are large and comfortable, with all requirements available.
reviews.negatives: Had to ask twice to get the room cleaned and they forgot about my wakeup call. The food at the coffee shop is fair, but not great.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Nice renovated hotel
reviews.negatives:
Didn’t get the room i booked: kingsize turned to very small sueensize. 
Highfloor was only 6th (goes up to 16 floors).
Pictures show a shower. Was an old bathtub. 
Power outlets didn’t work or veeery low voltage.
Not available to communicatie online through email or booking app chat.
Noisy hallway

reviews.negatives: Expensive food and drink and the room could have had a few more amenities. The reception team were rather rude and didn’t seem to care about guests and being friendly. The Swim club staff were nice though x

reviews.negatives: Not much really. All was as expected.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: FANTASTIC STAFF AT A FANTASTIC HOTEL.
reviews.positives: oh my goodness the STAFF were FRICKEN AMAZING. BEST STAFF IN THE WORLD! I think one f the desk managers was called JARROD. OH MY GOODNESS - and actually ALL of the staff were BEYOND AMAZING AND PHENOMENAL. They helped me so much and were ANGELS with hidden wings.
reviews.negatives: everything at the hotel was CASHLESS PAYMENTS ONLY.

reviews.title: Will be back!
reviews.positives: Such a cool hotel and the pool bar is fantastic! The Caesar salad was to die for 🤤 parking was easy and location was right by downtown.

reviews.title: Fun, happeneing and friendly stay
reviews.positives: Super fun spot for leisure or professional stay. Loved the art deco, pink pool house decor. Staff were lovely, new the area well for recommendations and all around a great time
reviews.negatives: Hotel lobby caffe was a rip off and toaster wasn’t working. Minor in the scheme of things but did feel this experience could be improved and make the hotel all round 9-10 with better product selection, pricing and helpful cafe staff.  Big different from the hotel attention to detail which was awesome!

reviews.title: Modern Comfy Stay

reviews.title: Uma ótima opção para quem quer se hospedar em Downtown Austin
reviews.positives: Em uma veagem de 12 dias, ficamos em duas ocasiões neste hotel e gostamos bastante. Não é nada sofisticado, porém despojado, tem um ótimo atendimento, é limpo, possui uma ótima piscina, boa localização, tem um café localizado no térreo que facilita bastante e a cama super confortável. O único porém, é o valor da diária de estacionamento! Meio alta, se não me engano, US$65
reviews.negatives: Diária um pouco alta para um hotel 4* e valor da diária do estacionamento altissima!

reviews.title: Ótima opção em Austin Downtown

Localização, facilidade de locomoção para a universidade, estádio é Downtown. 
O hotel possui um café no térreo com boas opções de acompanhamentos e snacks.
reviews.negatives: Achei o banheiro mal equipado. Faltavam suportes para colocar as toalhas.  O quarto tb tem um problema de iluminação. A noite fica muito escuro e não dá pra trabalhar.

reviews.title: Exceptional
